class.name: CloudSaveProvider
class.brief_description: Abstract base class for cloud save platform backends.
class.description: [CloudSaveProvider] is an abstract interface for cloud save platform backends. Each platform (Steam, Xbox, PlayStation, Google Play, Custom HTTP) implements this contract. The [SaveServer] remains agnostic of the underlying SDK by delegating all network I/O through a provider.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Called once by [SaveServer] on startup. Implementations should validate credentials and prepare any SDK handles.

method.name: is_ready
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the provider is ready to accept upload/download calls.

method.name: upload
method.description: Serializes [param snapshot] to bytes and uploads it to the cloud under [param slot_name].

method.name: download
method.description: Downloads the cloud snapshot for [param slot_name]. Populates [param snapshot] on success.

method.name: query_slot
method.description: Returns remote metadata for a slot without downloading the full blob. Meta is populated into the [param info] dictionary.

method.name: delete_slot
method.description: Deletes a slot from the cloud.

method.name: get_provider_name
method.description: Returns the human-readable name for logging and UI (e.g. "Steam", "Xbox").

constants.constant: initialize() was not called or failed.
A conflict was detected and could not be resolved.
Requested slot does not exist in the cloud.
Required credentials or endpoint not set.
